arts.ttl: LaLiga injury news, predicted lineups, fantasy updates
arts.sum: Find out who is missing through injury and who is in a race against time to prove their fitness in Spain's LaLiga this weekend.

This is a game that could be labelled a relegation six-pointer as 19th takes on 18th in La Liga. Las Palmas have endured a disappointing start to 2025, failing to secure a victory during that time, lo...
